name: player_rankings_history
expected_query: with "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b" as (select "pid", "player_rankings_index"."avg" AS "avg", "player_rankings_index"."overall_rank" AS "overall_rank", "player_rankings_index"."position_rank" AS "position_rank", "player_rankings_index"."min" AS "min", "player_rankings_index"."max" AS "max", "player_rankings_index"."std" AS "std" from "player_rankings_index" where "source_id" in ('FANTASYPROS') and "ranking_type" in ('PPR_REDRAFT') and "year" in (2026) and "week" = 0 and "seas_type" = 'REG' and player_rankings_index.avg <= '50') select "player"."pid", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."avg" AS "average_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."overall_rank" AS "overall_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."position_rank" AS "position_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."min" AS "min_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."max" AS "max_rank_0", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."std" AS "rank_stddev_0", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b" on "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."avg", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."overall_rank", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."position_rank", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."min", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."max", "te776e246ce9453301597d3d38dd0200b"."std", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 ASC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
